@luau/global/debug.getcoverage.documentation: Returns code coverage data for a function or script instance. Each entry contains the function name, line defined, nesting depth, and per-line hit counts. When passed a script instance, returns coverage for all functions in the file including local and unexported ones.

@luau/global/debug.getcoverage/overload/.documentation: Returns code coverage data for a single function. The returned array contains one entry for the function itself, plus additional entries for any functions defined inside it.
The function to collect coverage data for.

An array of CoverageEntry tables, one per function (including nested functions). Each entry has Function (name), LineDefined, Depth, and Hits (per-line counts where -1 = non-executable, 0 = not hit, >0 = hit count).

Returns code coverage data for all functions in a file via its script instance. Includes local and unexported functions not visible from the module table. The script must have been previously required for coverage data to be available.
A script instance pointing to the file to collect coverage for.
An array of CoverageEntry tables for every function in the file.

@luau/global/debug.iscoverageenabled.documentation: Returns whether code coverage instrumentation is currently enabled. In Lune, coverage is enabled by default. Set LUNE_COVERAGE=0 to disable.

@luau/global/debug.iscoverageenabled/ret.documentation: True if coverage is enabled, false otherwise.
